Public inspection storyboard

Journey guest-inspects-item begins on public home and ends with readable detail or a recoverable error.

home

A guest arrives without an account, understands that the catalogue is public, and sees the stable home-loading content skeleton while items load.

The guest activates open-detail on one item. The action carries the selected item identifier into the next surface.

detail

The selected item becomes the page context. Successful loading reveals its detail and keeps a clear route back to home.

If loading fails, detail-error replaces the content region with an explanation and the contracted retry-detail action. Retry preserves the item, moves through loading feedback, and restores detail.
